rationale: The score is identical (6/10), strengths are identical, and both concerns lists are substantively the same. The justification reorders an already-listed concern (capital markets/fixed income) and the Windows concern is merely reworded ('No mention of Windows platform experience' vs 'Lack of specific experience on Windows platform') — same meaning. None of the differences key off the Berlin→São Paulo location change; they are within ordinary run-to-run wording noise.
